creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192513
Updated port svn .diff

*Note*: 
edbrowse depends on: new port lang/duktape-lib  Bug #227516
(It is just a shared lib, please commit it too)

www/edbrowse update:

* from 3.5.1 to 3.7.3
* new maintainer: from ports@freebsd.org to alfix86@gmail.com
* master site
* updated dependencies
* added freebsd patches


tested in 12.0 current with '#port test',
NOTE portlint warn:

Makefile: LIB_DEPENDS don't specify the ABI version number .0 in libtidy-0.99.so.0 unless it is really necessary.

Now it is necessary because www/tidy-devel does not install libtidy-0.99.so .

Please commit it
Thanks Alfonso
